title: X3R's Dungeons
description: Vanilla styled dungeon mod which adds a handful of weapons, mobs, bosses and structures
body:
Vanilla styled dungeon mod which adds a handful of weapons, mobs, bosses and structures

Currently the mod has 3 main structures:

      Piglin Camp - a small outpost where a group of Piglins is stranded in the overworld.

      Piglin Forge - a large structure containing gold, netherite, and other magical items which boost the stats of the player.

      Dragon remains - the bones of a deceased dragon lies guarded by skeletons, in the middle of which lays treasure.

Dependencies not on Modrinth:
     https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/curios
